productDisplayName: Vans Unisex  Era Black Casual Shoes
description: vans Era taps into the classic striped mood of the moment with this low-top pair. Wear this spin off of the classic Vans Era with off-duty essentials. Stylish enough to wear sockless. Vans uses textures of canvas on the heel collar, perfect to match the rich denim hues in your ensemble. Upper Canvas upper with pinstripes Vanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sandal sock liner Central lacing system Logo flag on midfoot Padded tongue and collar for instep comfort Cut low at the ankle for style Midsole PU midsole for better shock absorption PU foxing on the toe box Outsole Geometric patterned sole texture on the flexible vulcanized gum rubber outsole shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
